_comment: Per-million-token USD prices for the models NanoClaw can run. Update this file when providers change prices — daily cost reports read these numbers. Copy to ~/.nanoclaw/model-pricing.json to activate.
_pricing_note: Each entry is USD per 1M tokens. `cached_input` is optional — if omitted, cached tokens are billed at 10% of `input` (the 90% cache discount both OpenAI and Anthropic apply). Override per-model when a provider deviates.
_fallback_comment: Used when a run logs a model name not in the prices map above. Tune this to a reasonable middle so unknown-model costs aren't wildly off.
